name: Project Proposal Acceptance Letter
description: A formal business letter notifying a vendor, contractor, or freelancer that their project proposal has been accepted.
content:
From:
{{accepting_party_name}}
{{#if accepting_contact_person}}{{accepting_contact_person}}
{{/if}}

Date: {{formatDate acceptance_date}}

To:
{{vendor_company_name}}
{{vendor_address}}

RE: Acceptance of Proposal for {{project_name}} (Ref No: {{proposal_number}})

Dear {{vendor_contact_person}},

We are pleased to inform you that we have reviewed your proposal dated {{formatDate proposal_date}} regarding the {{project_name}} project, and we have decided to accept it.

We accept the scope of work, timelines, and the total proposed cost of {{total_accepted_amount}} (excluding applicable taxes) as outlined in your proposal.

{{#if additional_terms_notes}}

Please note that our acceptance is subject to the following additional terms or notes discussed previously:

{{additional_terms_notes}}
{{/if}}

Regarding the financial arrangements, the initial payment will be processed as follows: {{initial_payment_info}}.

We anticipate that the project will commence on or around {{formatDate project_start_date}}. We will be in touch shortly to finalize any formal agreements or onboarding steps required to begin the work.

We look forward to a successful collaboration and a highly productive working relationship with your team.

Sincerely,

_________________________
{{#if accepting_contact_person}}{{accepting_contact_person}}{{else}}{{accepting_party_name}}{{/if}}
{{accepting_party_name}}

fields.name: initial_payment_info
fields.label: Initial Payment Details
fields.placeholder: e.g., Wire transfer within 5 business days, Check attached
